title: EB and CC on the latest - Language change
scenario: Verify that no CC update pop-up appears on the Device Home Screen after a successful language change when the CC firmware is already up to date.
steps: 2. Change the device language to a different language.
3. Wait for the language change to complete successfully.
4. Return to the Device Home Screen.
5. Observe whether the CC (Connectivity Card) pop-up card appears.
expected: The CC pop-up card should NOT be present since the CC is already on the latest firmware.
